description: The OpenAPI Initiative is an industry consortium under the Linux Foundation that develops and publishes the OpenAPI Specification and related specifications such as Arazzo and Overlay. Its website provides information about the initiative, specifications, events, and participation resources.
summary: openapis.org exposes no developer integration surfaces on its own domain beyond a public informational website and llms.txt; no HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI targeting openapis.org was found.
